description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing system packages (apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install -yqq libmcrypt-dev g++ libsqlite3-dev libssl-dev libcurl3-dev libxml2-dev libzzip-dev libpq-dev, rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*), installs PHP extensions via docker-php-ext-install (hash json mcrypt mbstring pdo pdo_mysql simplexml pdo_pgsql pdo_sqlite), and writes "date.timezone = UTC" to /usr/local/etc/php/php.ini. Define a single job named php7.1 that runs in the default stage, uses the mileschou/phalcon:7.1 Docker image, and executes curl --location --output /usr/local/bin/phpunit https://phar.phpunit.de/phpunit-7.1.5.phar, chmod +x /usr/local/bin/phpunit, then phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml. Add a mysql:latest service and set MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables for the MySQL service.
